controls.generalSearch: Host, Host ID, Reader, Read Session ID
table.emptyDataMessage: No partitions match the current search
confirm_move-offset-to-start: Are you sure you want to move the partition "{{partitionId}}" offset to the start of the topic for the consumer "{{consumer}}"?

error_invalid-offset: Please enter a valid non-negative integer
